sharedStateObservations: When overriding PyTorch nn.Module methods like state_dict() and load_state_dict(), use # type: ignore comments to handle Liskov substitution principle violations with PyTorch's strict typing. The pattern is to accept Mapping[str, Any] for load_state_dict and convert to dict internally for mutation.

SynapticLayer successfully combines EMAActivity, TieredQuantizer, and recovery mechanisms into a drop-in nn.Linear replacement. Activity tracking is done via register_hook on weight.grad during backward pass.
For extra_repr() methods with long f-strings, break into multi-line format using parentheses to avoid E501 line-too-long lint errors while maintaining readability.

testCoverage.notes: 37 tests covering initialization, forward/backward passes (VAL-LAY-001, VAL-LAY-002), state management (VAL-LAY-003), nn.Linear compatibility (VAL-LAY-004), activity tracking integration, and edge cases.
